phagocytosis-checkpoint.note: Exact leaf but tiny pool (n~18). Scaffold mechanism.
phagocytosis-checkpoint.reason: independent-descriptor pool n=0 < N_MIN=30 (all discriminative descriptors are keyword-tautological)

antibody-drug-conjugate.note: Single ADC parent leaf (n~197); independent of the "antibody-drug conjugate" keyword.

bispecific-antibody.note: Exact bispecific leaf (n~209). Scaffold mechanism (not in frozen-19 results).

car-t.note: "Receptors, Chimeric Antigen" (n~248) is the exact CAR leaf (independent of the "chimeric antigen receptor" keyword by word order). "Immunotherapy, Adoptive" (n~299) sits on ~87% of CAR-T papers, routed here not to immunotherapy.

epigenetic.note: Therapy leaves only. Broad "Epigenesis, Genetic" is general biology (inflates the pool, depresses apparent recall) and is EXCLUDED. The lone INDEPENDENT leaf is "DNA Methylation", so the measured recall (~55%) is genuinely the LOWEST of the headline set for two compounding reasons: (a) a real keyword- coverage gap (the field says "epigenetic modifications/regulation", "EZH2 inhibitor", "BET inhibitor" which the keyword set does not yet carry), and (b) "DNA Methylation" also tags basic methylation BIOLOGY that is not epigenetic THERAPY, so part of the gap is reference-scope breadth, not a miss. Kept (not dropped) because the keyword-coverage half is an actionable finding.

immunotherapy.note: Checkpoint immunotherapy. Bare "Immunotherapy" (n~1011) is the umbrella term and is EXCLUDED as non-discriminative; "Immunotherapy, Adoptive" is routed to car-t. Keyed on the checkpoint-inhibitor leaf (n~348).

metabolic-targeting.note: Warburg leaf is specific but tiny (n~6); Glycolysis broader. Low-confidence.

sonodynamic.note: Shared with general ultrasound therapy; lower discriminativeness.

unmeasurable.bioelectric: Only cell-physiology descriptors (Membrane Potentials / Ion Channels), not the cancer-therapy thesis; pool thin and confounded.
unmeasurable.cold-atmospheric-plasma: No descriptor ('Plasma Gases' n~2); ~100% of its tagger-positives have empty MeSH.
unmeasurable.cuproptosis: No cuproptosis MeSH term (only 'Copper', the ion, n~6); 0 frozen-index tags. Scaffold.
unmeasurable.disulfidptosis: Descriptor exists but n=1; 0 frozen-index tags. Scaffold.
unmeasurable.electrolysis: Bucket-confounded: ~18/19 of its MeSH-pool carry 'Electrochemotherapy', which the tagger buckets as electrochemical-therapy (a taxonomy-boundary artifact, not a recall miss).
unmeasurable.radioligand-therapy: Descriptors ('Radioimmunotherapy'/'Radiopharmaceuticals') bleed to immunotherapy/ADC; tiny pool (n~18). Scaffold.
unmeasurable.targeted-protein-degradation: Only the broad housekeeping 'Proteolysis'; no PROTAC descriptor; tiny pool (n~11). Scaffold.
unmeasurable.ttfields: No TTFields-specific MeSH descriptor (only over-broad Electric Stimulation Therapy); ~38% of its tagger-positives also have empty MeSH.
